brand.name: Bluethumb Technologies
brand.tagline: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.

hero.headline: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.
hero.lede: Bluethumb creates socially innovative financial technologies that help businesses strengthen communities and help individuals make better-informed decisions.

about.title: Innovative financial products designed for real-world progress.
about.body: Bluethumb Technologies builds modern financial products that connect business growth with community value, and help investors understand markets with greater confidence.

focus.title: Community-centered loyalty
focus.body: Connecting businesses and communities through smarter loyalty technology.

focus.title: AI-powered intelligence
focus.body: Helping investors understand markets through clear, explainable intelligence.

products.title: Two distinct experiences. One mission.
products.body: Blueprint connects retailers, customers, and communities. Trading Intelligence gives self-directed investors a multi-brain reasoning engine with paper-first safety.

blueprint.title: Reward customers. Support communities. Create impact.
paragraphs: Blueprint is a next-generation loyalty platform designed to help retailers attract and retain customers while creating positive impact within the communities they serve.
Unlike traditional loyalty programs focused only on transactions, Blueprint connects retailers, consumers, and local communities around a stronger shared outcome.

trading.title: Professional-grade trading intelligence for self-directed investors.
trading.lede: Bluethumb is an AI-powered decision-support platform that watches the markets, reads the news, scores every symbol through dozens of intelligence layers, and explains its thinking in plain English.
trading.paperFirst: It runs in paper mode by default — you get the full experience without risking real capital until you choose to connect a broker.
trading.committee: Under the hood, Bluethumb is not one model guessing at the market. It is a committee of specialist brains — technical analysts, news readers, forecast engines, risk officers, and portfolio managers — that debate every symbol. Their outputs flow into OKF, the platform’s confidence engine: one time-aware ground truth per symbol. When the committee agrees, confidence rises; when sources contradict, confidence falls — and you see exactly why.

okf.title: OKF — Organized Knowledge Format
okf.body: OKF maintains one living knowledge record per symbol: technicals, news, forecasts, and multi-agent conclusions — each tagged with freshness, source trust, and explicit contradictions. Alignment raises confidence; disagreement lowers it.

why.title: News → signals
why.copy: Headlines are scored and tied to the symbols you care about.

why.title: Multi-layer confidence
why.copy: Buy/sell only when independent systems agree — not one black-box score.

why.title: Plain-English reasoning
why.copy: Every decision explained in language you can act on.

why.title: Walk-forward forecasts
why.copy: Price paths validated against real history — not static AI targets.

why.title: Paper-first safety
why.copy: Full dashboard and simulated fills before any live broker connection.

why.title: Three-currency book
why.copy: CAD stocks, USD stocks, and crypto each have their own wallet and P&L.

pipeline.title: Decision Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: User signal flows through every specialist brain into one explainable decision.

stages.title: User Signal
stages.subtitle: Intent, portfolio context, and live market data

dataStack.name: Relational memory
dataStack.copy: Trades, fills, configs, and durable session history — the auditable ledger behind every decision.

dataStack.name: Vector memory
dataStack.copy: Finds similar news, reasoning snippets, and past setups so specialist brains can remember what worked.

dataStack.name: Graph intelligence
dataStack.copy: Maps peers, supply chains, and who-moves-with-whom for correlated risk and opportunity.

dataStack.name: OKF consensus
dataStack.copy: Fuses every brain into one confidence record with evidence, contradictions, and plain-English explanation.

features.title: AI Market Analysis
features.copy: Understand market conditions through multiple intelligence layers.

features.title: News Intelligence
features.copy: See how events and headlines influence the symbols you follow.

features.title: Explainable Decisions
features.copy: View the reasoning behind each insight — not just a score.

features.title: Walk-forward Forecasting
features.copy: Explore validated scenarios from minutes to months ahead.

features.title: Portfolio Intelligence
features.copy: Track Canadian investments, US investments, ETFs, and cryptocurrency.

features.title: Risk Awareness
features.copy: Keep opportunities and risks visible as conditions change.

features.title: Paper-First Safety
features.copy: Explore strategies and insights without risking real capital.

gallery.title: Built for clarity across markets, portfolios, alerts, and forecasts.
gallery.body: Available as a Progressive Web App on desktop and mobile. Production: bluethumb-trading-app.pages.dev

items.title: Market overview
items.copy: CAD, USD, and crypto wallets with session P&L, win rate, and live engine status.

items.title: Forecasts
items.copy: Walk-forward paths, confidence bands, and plain-English model reasoning.

items.title: Alerts
items.copy: Severity-ranked headlines linked to symbols with source and confidence.

items.title: Portfolio intelligence
items.copy: Per-symbol P&L bars across Canadian and US books.

items.title: Performance
items.copy: Top and worst performers with realized and unrealized gains.

mission.title: Technology should empower people.
mission.body: Bluethumb Technologies creates products that simplify complexity and create meaningful impact. Blueprint helps communities and businesses connect. Bluethumb Trading Intelligence helps investors better understand markets.
mission.statement: Build technology that helps people make better decisions.
